tools.name: steam_search
tools.description: Search for video games on Steam by description, genre tags, price, and platform. Returns game details with cover images, trailers, and screenshots in a browsable carousel.

tools.name: steam_reviews
tools.description: View user reviews for a specific Steam game. Returns an AI-generated summary of player sentiment, what players love and criticize, with filtering by recency, sentiment, and language.

tools.name: review_overview
tools.description: View analytics dashboard showing player sentiment trends across roguelite game reviews. Visualizes how sentiment changes by playtime, compares top games, and shows early access vs post-launch patterns.

tools.name: reviews_text_search
tools.description: Search Steam review text for specific topics or keywords like 'difficulty', 'bugs', or 'multiplayer'. Returns matching review excerpts with sentiment analysis and AI-generated theme insights.
